items.title: 76ers to decline team option on Trendon Watford, allowing him to hit unrestricted free agency
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: 76ers to decline team option on Trendon Watford, allowing him to hit unrestricted free agency HoopsHype

items.title: Can confirm via a league source that the Sixers are picking up the team options for Dominick Barlow ($3.4 million) and Dalen Terry ($2.6 million) for the 2026-27 season. They also must make a team option decision on Trendon Watford ($2.8 million) by the end of today.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Can confirm via a league source that the Sixers are picking up the team options for Dominick Barlow ($3.4 million) and Dalen Terry ($2.6 million) for the 2026-27 season. They also must make a team option decision on Trendon Watford ($2.8 million) by the end of today.

items.title: Common thought for a while had been that Trendon Watford would return on a decline-and-re-sign deal where he ends up on a new one-year, veteran's minimum contract. But as of now that is not the Sixers' plan. Looking like Watford is headed for his fourth NBA team.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Common thought for a while had been that Trendon Watford would return on a decline-and-re-sign deal where he ends up on a new one-year, veteran's minimum contract. But as of now that is not the Sixers' plan. Looking like Watford is headed for his fourth NBA team.

items.title: Sixers are declining Trendon Watford's team option, per Tony Jones.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Sixers are declining Trendon Watford's team option, per Tony Jones.

That brings Philadelphia's total space to $25,413,152 below the first apron.

items.title: I am told that Trendon Watford is "unlikely" to return to the Sixers in 2026-27 after his $2.8 million team option was declined today.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
I am told that Trendon Watford is "unlikely" to return to the Sixers in 2026-27 after his $2.8 million team option was declined today.

Story: www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Source: Trendon Watford unlikely to return to Sixers after $2.8 million team option declined
media.description: Trendon Watford averaged 16.3 minutes, 6.5 points, 3.3 rebounds and 2.5 assists across 53 games in his first year with the Sixers.
